summary: [critical] WIN-013 Van Camp et al. 2001 DOI broken (DOI 10.1023/A:1013940928637 returns 404; journal-prefix mismatch). Replaced with Mansinha, Ducarme, Hinderer, Meurers & van Ruymbeke (2001, J. Geodet. Soc. Japan 47(1) 387–391, DOI 10.11366/sokuchi1954.47.387) — the peer-reviewed record of the four-station SG null at Membach, Uccles, Strasbourg, and Vienna. Fixed in WIN-013 (PATCH-358-A) and SEC-6.14 (PATCH-358-E). EXP-358 review_class: verification — batchable per PROP-025. All replacement citations were independently verified via web search + direct page fetch; no verdict logic changes.
